verdict_note: Confirmed code defects 4.2 (fake five-worker concurrency), 4.3 (throttle not wired), and 4.8 (quarantine symlink-follow) are reproduced-then-fixed with red-green tests. Full suite: 939 passed + 44 subtests, rc=0. Several subsystems remain not-wired-to-production or blocked on external infrastructure; those scenarios are reported honestly below and the verdict is INCOMPLETE (not COMPLETE).

scenarios.name: False statement -> CANDIDATE_DISPROOF
scenarios.note: Controlled false fixture with an executable predicate. Arbitrary free-text has no synthesized predicate, so free-text false statements land OPEN/BLOCKED, not a counterexample.

scenarios.name: Ambiguous + injected formal/external evidence stays BLOCKED_BY_INTERPRETATION
scenarios.command: egmra run --erdos 312 --provider deterministic --policy signed-policy.json ; pytest egmra/tests/test_result_states.py

scenarios.name: Finite computation -> COMPUTATIONAL_EVIDENCE
scenarios.observed: classifier maps a finite exact-computation-supported goal to COMPUTATIONAL_EVIDENCE, distinct from a general proof
scenarios.note: The full fixture CLI path to COMPUTATIONAL_EVIDENCE additionally requires the signed --intent-review artifact; without it the honest state is PARTIAL_PROGRESS.

scenarios.name: Known theorem through browser + Lean -> FORMALLY_VERIFIED_CANDIDATE
scenarios.reason: Requires a live authenticated browser producing a valid Lean proof AND a built pinned Mathlib (v4.28.0) kernel. Components exist and are tested (BrowserChatGPTRunner live-verified for reasoning; LeanReplayVerifier + AttestedKernelRunner unit-tested), but the end-to-end live chain has not been run.
scenarios.activation: cd aristotle_lean_project && lake exe cache get && lake build; then supply a pinned AttestedKernelRunner as the LeanReplayVerifier checker.

scenarios.name: Aristotle submit/poll/download + local Lean replay + sealed attestation
scenarios.reason: Official aristotlelib SDK adapter implemented + hermetic fake-SDK tests pass. Live run needs a (rotated) ARISTOTLE_API_KEY and the built Lean project.
scenarios.activation: export ARISTOTLE_API_KEY=... ; build aristotle_lean_project ; AristotleSdkClient.submit/fetch + bind_local_replay(LeanReplayVerifier)

scenarios.name: Five workers, real overlap, no dup/skip, fencing, bounded
scenarios.command: egmra campaign --erdos-range 5-14 --provider deterministic --workers 5 --policy signed-policy.json --state s.json ; pytest egmra/tests/test_campaign.py
scenarios.observed: concurrency report max_observed_concurrency=5, distinct_workers=5 (w0..w4), no duplicate/skipped problems; Barrier(5) test proves genuine simultaneity.
scenarios.note: Deterministic provider supports real 5-worker concurrency. Browser provider is capped to --workers 1: Playwright's sync API is single-threaded; multi-tab async browser concurrency is documented future work.

scenarios.name: Rate limiting: shared cooldown, <=120s, retain on outage, resume
scenarios.observed: SharedThrottle cross-worker cooldown persists + clamps to 120s + honors Retry-After; BrowserProviderUnavailable retains the job (exit 4), never a math failure; wired into the browser provider via _browser_throttle().
scenarios.note: Simulated throttling verified. Live browser throttling not exercised (needs sustained live load).

scenarios.name: Kill and restart resume without skip/dup; stale output rejected
scenarios.observed: durable HMAC-signed campaign state resumes with no skip/dup; stale fencing tokens rejected; tampered state fails closed

scenarios.name: Live retrieval + OEIS frozen packet with provenance
scenarios.reason: The production CLI does not yet construct a LIVE retrieval service or wire OEISClient into egmra run/campaign (defect 4.4 not implemented this session). Retrieval is an in-memory local corpus; OEIS is offline. An OEIS/retrieval match never promotes proof status (enforced), but live queries + frozen-packet-to-worker wiring are not done.

scenarios.name: Clean wheel runs all CLI paths outside the checkout
scenarios.command: pip wheel . --no-deps -w /tmp/w ; pip install <wheel> in a fresh venv ; cd /tmp ; egmra --help/doctor/run --erdos 312 --provider deterministic
scenarios.observed: wheel self-contained (corpus packaged, no erdos_common/erdos_ingest); egmra run --erdos 312 outside checkout -> BLOCKED_BY_INTERPRETATION, rc=0

scenarios.name: PostgreSQL concurrent append/reconnect/replay/resume/rollback
scenarios.reason: PostgresEventStore live append + verify_integrity + merkle-head replay verified earlier on a disposable postgres:16 (scenario-11 core). The production CLI/orchestrator do NOT yet expose --event-store postgres or run campaigns on it (defect 4.9 CLI wiring not implemented this session).
scenarios.activation: docker run postgres:16 ; pip install -e .[postgres] ; PostgresEventStore(dsn) append/verify/merkle

scenarios.name: Security adversarial rejections
scenarios.observed: rejects: malicious archives (traversal/symlink/bomb/oversize), pre-existing symlink quarantine dest (inside+outside root, lstat no-follow), forged/stale checker attestations, wrong-claim + wrong-target Lean proofs, stale fencing tokens, tampered campaign checkpoints

defects_fixed_this_session.title: Fake five-worker concurrency
defects_fixed_this_session.detail: Campaign.drain hardcoded worker_ids[0]. Added Campaign.run_concurrent (threads, per-worker leases, monotonic fencing, heartbeats, in-process+fcntl lock) + _concurrency_report. CLI campaign uses it. Barrier(5) test proves real overlap.

defects_fixed_this_session.title: Shared rate limiting not wired
defects_fixed_this_session.detail: _browser_throttle() builds a durable SharedThrottle for the browser provider; _build_runner passes it to BrowserChatGPTRunner in both run and campaign.

defects_fixed_this_session.title: Aristotle quarantine symlink-follow
defects_fixed_this_session.detail: resolve_quarantine_dir() now lstat-checks the root and the job-dir child WITHOUT following, joins job_id onto the resolved root without resolving the child, and verify_local_replay rescans the tree for symlinks immediately before replay.

remaining_defects_not_addressed_this_ses.title: Full typed worker-output schema (proof steps, assumptions, formalization requests, Lean declaration candidates)
Live retrieval + OEIS wired into the production CLI
Model experiment proposals -> executed ExperimentSpec via trusted compute in production
LeanService wired into egmra run/campaign; live kernel run
remaining_defects_not_addressed_this_ses.status: NOT_DONE (adapter + LeanReplayVerifier exist; toolchain not built)

remaining_defects_not_addressed_this_ses.title: Aristotle wired as --formalizer local|aristotle|both
remaining_defects_not_addressed_this_ses.status: PARTIAL (SDK client done; orchestrator flag not added)

remaining_defects_not_addressed_this_ses.title: Durable content-addressed browser transcript artifacts + signed claim->exchange events
Distinct worker roles/packets/priors + branch fingerprints wired to allocation
